creator: yzlin@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
- Update to 0.8
- Add a new knob UNICODE, which uses libncursesw instead of libncurses to enable Unicode support.
- Disable "CPU affinity configuration", which uses some unsupported system calls in FreeBSD.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-Makefile.am
- files/patch-Process.c
- files/patch-Process.h
- files/patch-configure.ac
- files/patch-htop.c

Port maintainer (tshadwick@oss-solutions.com) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
